summary: The South Bay closed March in a funding frenzy, with over $4 billion raised across 23 deals. Nexthop AI (Santa Clara), Ayar Labs (San Jose), and Mind Robotics (Palo Alto) each landed half-billion-dollar rounds, while hardware makers like Frore Systems (San Jose) and SiFive (Santa Clara) secured massive capital for chip and thermal tech. Most local firms are hiring, though a couple are tightening belts.
